## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated in `tests/tmech_test.h` (new numerics checked
      against an analytical/reference result)
- [ ] Test suite passes locally with `TMECH_USE_XSIMD=OFF` **and** `=ON`
- [ ] Builds warning-clean (`-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Werror`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changed
- [ ] PR targets the `master` branch
